10504205.description: Dueling restraining orders, a stolen car and accusations of slander come into play when a couple break up. Then, a defendant insists that his ex-fiancee's sister never lent him $5,000.

10548044.description: Plaintiffs sue a former friend for crashing their truck. A man wants his aunt to repay loans for car payments, gas and Christmas decorations. A mother demands payback for saving her son and his fiancee from eviction by paying their rent.

A man claims the pedigree puppy he found in the middle of the road would have been euthanised if he hadn't taken him in. The pet's original owner is sued for his vet bills.

10619005.description: A vicious assault with high heels at a rowdy college party leaves the plaintiff's face requiring stitches.

10623049.title: Judge Judy
10623049.description: Exes fight over money, a man says his neighbours' dog attacked his two dogs and sues for vet bills, and a couple sue their daughter for rent.

10623134.title: Judge Judy
10623134.description: Fellow Lion's Club members accuse each other of face-punching, teeth breaking, and cursing at a wife.

10623232.title: Judge Judy
10623232.description: A man demands that his ex-roommate pay him back for unpaid rent. A man accuses his former tenant of owing for rent and the unpaid balance on a scooter.

10626910.title: Judge Judy
10626910.description: A woman's expensive lingerie goes missing; a man beats a pit bull after it attacks him.

10626990.title: Judge Judy
10626990.description: A dog's owners sue the pet sitter for veterinary bills after the animal is hit by a car; a former friend sues a hair salon owner for repayment of loans.

10630062.title: Judge Judy
10630062.description: Exes fight over money, a man says his neighbours' dog attacked his two dogs and sues for vet bills, and a couple sue their daughter for rent.

10630944.title: Judge Judy
10630944.description: Fellow Lion's Club members accuse each other of face-punching, teeth breaking, and cursing at a wife.

10631047.title: Judge Judy
10631047.description: A man demands that his ex-roommate pay him back for unpaid rent. A man accuses his former tenant of owing for rent and the unpaid balance on a scooter.

10637478.title: Judge Judy
10637478.description: A woman fights with her ex-boyfriend over an oven.

10639449.title: Judge Judy
10639449.description: Neighbours accuse each other of child abuse and harassment. Then, a woman says her sister stole her TV while she was in jail.

10639521.title: Judge Judy
10639521.description: A disabled veteran, who says that a pit bull attacked his service dog, sues the owner for damages.

10640392.title: Judge Judy
10640392.description: A landlord says the police raided his property because of a tenant's teen parties. Then, a woman sues her ex and his mother for medical bills.

10641576.title: Judge Judy
10641576.description: Glasses are broken during a drinking game. Then, a mother of two toddlers sues a caretaker for the return of pre-paid baby-sitting fees.

10642438.title: Judge Judy
10642438.description: Ex-friends argue over rent and utilities. Then, a former couple fight over accusations of assault and the return of a laptop.

10646448.title: Judge Judy
10646448.description: A plaintiff says her son's fiancee destroyed her belongings and failed to pay rent. A woman wants her child's father to repay her for an amusement park pass. A defendant says he had no choice but to kick down his sister's door.

10646563.title: Judge Judy
10646563.description: A landlord sues a former tenant for a utility bill, property damage and vandalism.

10647378.title: Judge Judy
10647378.description: A woman sues the father of her child for unpaid rent; she says when he lost his job, he stopped paying his bills.

10650473.title: Judge Judy
10650473.description: A pregnant teen is sued for medical bills and property damage after she assaults another teen; a man sues former residents for leaving his duplex a mess.

10650556.title: Judge Judy
10650556.description: Men fight over damages after one punches the other; a former friend sues a teen for repayment of a loan.

10654371.title: Judge Judy
10654371.description: A plaintiff says her son's fiancee destroyed her belongings and failed to pay rent. A woman wants her child's father to repay her for an amusement park pass. A defendant says he had no choice but to kick down his sister's door.

10654514.title: Judge Judy
10654514.description: A landlord sues a former tenant for a utility bill, property damage and vandalism.

10655371.title: Judge Judy
10655371.description: A woman sues the father of her child for unpaid rent; she says when he lost his job, he stopped paying his bills.

10660318.title: Judge Judy
10660318.description: A woman sues her daughter and new son-in-law for back rent and car expenses. They claim she's just mad that they got married.

10662260.title: Judge Judy
10662260.description: A teen who smashed out a man's car window says she was defending herself after nearly being run over. Then, a woman says her sister keyed her car.

10662342.title: Judge Judy
10662342.description: A woman says her ex's girlfriend keyed her car and bit her arm. Then, a man wants his ex to repay him for the car he helped her to buy.

10663210.title: Judge Judy
10663210.description: A dog's owner sues for veterinary bills after a teen hits it with a motorcycle.

10664428.title: Judge Judy
10664428.description: Ex-roommates argue over personal property, an arrest and the disappearance of valuable anime action-figures.
